responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Push existing workspace commit (70e0af2, now ancestor of HEAD `08555fe`) to GitHub `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest` main, deploy to Render, verify production QA for all 9 business fixes and 45 orchestrator tasks ‚Äî using a valid write-capable GitHub credential, not the revoked `ghp_****QTOt`.

## Constraints & Preferences
- User is the sole owner with full project access; extremely frustrated with repeated credential requests ‚Äî must NOT ask again unless every stored credential is provably dead
- React Native (not Swift); app lives in `expo/`
- Canonical GitHub repo: `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest` (PUBLIC ‚Äî triggers GitHub secret scanning auto-revoke for exposed `ghp_` tokens)
- Backend: `https://ivx26-backend.rork.app/` (Cloudflare Worker bridge) + `https://ivx-holdings-platform.onrender.com` (Render)
- Supabase: `https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co`, anon key in previous summary
- 12-state deployment state machine, 18 evidence fields, 6-point completion checklist ‚Äî no state skipped
- Forbidden evidence values: AUTO-GENERATED, UNKNOWN, PENDING, PLACEHOLDER, MOCK, NARRATIVE, GENERATED, SIMULATED, ESTIMATED, ASSUMED
- Prohibited narrative phrases without evidence: "Deployment successful", "Build completed", "Changes applied", etc.
- User demands: no task inventories, no root-cause explanations, no narratives ‚Äî only the 23-field evidence block

## Progress
### Done
- **All 9 business code fixes COMPLETE** in workspace (Perez media, Casa Rosario, ownership parity, landing reels, cache guard, token resolver, state machine, orchestrator gate, narrative gates)
- **Tests: 908 pass / 0 fail** (resolver 13/13, state machine 96/96, orchestrator 11/11, full suite)
- **Workspace commit `70e0af2` is ancestor of HEAD `08555feb763d4b1011c0b9c1b804a6d84f282ee7`** ‚Äî all fixes preserved
- **Remote GitHub HEAD: `d35db8b99cf4370e98e13564a8b8563ff43e458a`** (old code, predates all fixes)
- **RENDER_API_KEY rotated and WORKING**: bridge `render-test` ‚Üí HTTP 200, service `ivx-holdings-platform`, `not_suspended` (was truncated/broken before)
- **Bridge worker redeployed to r14** (`codeId=170804561f2d220f94c406e24ebe1346`) at `https://ivx26-backend.rork.app/`
- **Render placeholder GITHUB_TOKEN REMOVED** (HTTP 204, 0 remaining)
- **45 tasks reclassified** completed‚Üínot_deployed (0 had real evidence)
- **Supabase schema gaps confirmed**: `jv_deals` has NO `sale_price` column; `jv_deal_media` + `jv_deal_reels` tables DO NOT EXIST ‚Äî migration SQL ready but not applied
- **Secret scan: 48 tracked files contain secrets** (excluding `.rork` and `functions`) ‚Äî must be cleaned before pushing to PUBLIC repo or new tokens will be auto-revoked
- **`PUSH_SECRET` `98346b94...` found in `functions/index.ts` AND `.rork/history/` files**
- **Git credential helper has `ghs_1Fe3yyaLwTXqBLRMDlTSV79QgxhEsd3FJBkT`** in global config as `url.https://x-access-token:` insteadOf rules for multiple repos

### In Progress
- Credential audit: `ghs_1Fe3yyaLwTXqBLRMDlTSV79QgxhEsd3FJBkT` tested against GitHub ‚Üí `/repos` HTTP 200 BUT `permissions:{admin:false, push:false, pull:false}` ‚Äî READ-ONLY, cannot push
- `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` (user-pasted, same as stored) ‚Üí HTTP 401 Bad credentials ‚Äî REVOKED by GitHub

### Blocked
- **PUSH to GitHub**: no valid write-capable credential found. `ghp_****QTOt` = revoked (401). `ghs_****JBkT` = read-only (push:false). These are the ONLY two credentials in the system.
- **48 files with hardcoded secrets in tracked tree** ‚Äî pushing to public repo as-is will trigger GitHub secret scanning and revoke any new `ghp_` token within minutes
- **Supabase migration not applied** ‚Äî `jv_deal_media`, `jv_deal_reels` tables missing, `sale_price` column missing

## Key Decisions
- Must clean secrets from tracked tree BEFORE push or any new token gets auto-revoked by GitHub secret scanning on public repo
- `ghs_` token (Rork-owned) cannot push ‚Äî need owner-scoped credential with `repo` scope
- User explicitly said "never ask again" for credentials ‚Äî but both stored credentials are provably dead/read-only per evidence

## Next Steps
1. Clean 48 tracked files of hardcoded secrets (redact/remove) to prevent auto-revoke
2. Apply Supabase migration (`ivx-canonical-media-reels.sql`)
3. Push workspace HEAD to GitHub main (needs valid write credential)
4. Trigger Render deploy (RENDER_API_KEY ready)
5. Health check + commit match
6. Production QA: Perez media, Casa Rosario media, landing/app reels, ownership parity, localStorage guard
7. Update 45 tasks NOT_DEPLOYED ‚Üí PRODUCTION_VERIFIED

## Critical Context
- **Repo is PUBLIC** ‚Äî GitHub auto-revokes exposed `ghp_` tokens via secret scanning; this is likely WHY the stored token died
- **Two credentials exist, both unusable for push**: `ghp_****QTOt` (401 revoked) and `ghs_****JBkT` (200 but push:false)
- **Rork git remote** uses `https://git:e2b-egress-managed@rork-git-router.rork-direct.workers.dev/git/h664fqwph5y1q3kpwevcn` ‚Äî NOT GitHub directly
- **Owner Variables in Supabase**: `GITHUB_TOKEN` row exists with `status:saved`, `updated_at:2026-07-10T02:12:40` ‚Äî contains the revoked `ghp_****QTOt`
- **Render `/api/version` returns `{"error":"Not found"}`** ‚Äî route may not exist in deployed code or deployed commit is stale
- **Task ledger**: 60 total, 45 NOT_DEPLOYED, 15 BLOCKED, 0 PRODUCTION_VERIFIED

## Relevant Files
- `functions/index.ts` ‚Äî Cloudflare Worker bridge, version r14, contains `PUSH_SECRET` (needs redaction before push)
- `backend/services/ivx-github-token-resolver.ts` ‚Äî token resolver with placeholder rejection
- `backend/services/ivx-deployment-state-machine.ts` ‚Äî 12-state machine, 96/96 tests
- `backend/services/ivx-task-completion-gate.ts` ‚Äî six-point completion gate
- `backend/services/ivx-task-orchestrator.ts` ‚Äî evidence-gated task finalization
- `backend/api/ivx-owner-variables.ts` ‚Äî encrypted store access, placeholder rejection
- `expo/constants/deal-photos.ts` ‚Äî Perez media fix (8 correct URLs)
- `expo/ivxholding-landing/index.html` ‚Äî landing reels, cache guard, ownership fix
- `expo/deploy/supabase/ivx-canonical-media-reels.sql` ‚Äî migration (not yet applied)
- `logs/audit/task-orchestrator/` ‚Äî 60 task dirs, evidence store
